title: [FIRRTL] (code dump) type/value width mismatch materializing constant

features.name: xor of width-inferred signed zero constant with fixed-width signed operand
features.description: Code should include a bitwise XOR between a width-unspecified (inferred-width) signed zero constant and a fixed-width signed operand, triggering width inference and constant propagation interactions

features.name: unsigned register assigned from signed XOR result with mixed types
features.description: Code should include an unsigned register receiving assignment from a signed XOR expression where operand types are mismatched (SInt result assigned to UInt register), combined with width inference

features.name: register with async reset and typed reset value
features.description: Code should include a register with an asynchronous reset signal where the reset value is an explicitly typed constant matching the register width

features.name: width-unspecified signed constant in bitwise operation requiring width inference
features.description: Code should include a signed integer constant declared without explicit bit-width used in a bitwise operation alongside a fixed-width operand, exercising width inference for the constant
